items.title: Howard Lutnick shuts down Dem questions over Jeffrey Epstein at budget hearing
items.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick repeatedly shut down questions about his ties to Jeffrey Epstein during a House Appropriations Committee hearing.
